business.name: Pukal's Pressure Wash
business.tagline: Making Norfolk shine, one wash at a time

hero.headline: Your driveway will *actually shine*
hero.subheadline: We don't cut corners — just grime, mold, and years of buildup.

services_section.label: THE WASH
services_section.heading: Every surface, every detail
services_section.subheading: From driveways that shine to siding that looks new again

services.title: House Washing
services.description: Complete exterior cleaning that removes mold, mildew, and years of buildup. Your siding will look like it was just painted.

services.title: Driveway & Walkway Cleaning
services.description: Concrete and pavement restoration that brings back the original color. Oil stains and grime disappear.

services.title: Deck & Patio Cleaning
services.description: Wood and composite surface cleaning that restores natural beauty without damage to the material.

services.title: Commercial Pressure Washing
services.description: Storefront and building maintenance that keeps your business looking professional year-round.

about.heading: The guy who shows up
about.body: Norfolk pressure washing that's done right the first time. Anthony answers the phone, shows up when promised, and won't quit until it shines.

reviews.name: Debbie N.
reviews.text: Anthony took his time and went back over places he wasn't happy with. Never saw my walkway look so bright — it almost shined.

reviews.name: Robert D.
reviews.text: Great job on our driveway and walkway. Very meticulous and doesn't cut corners. We'll use him again.

reviews.name: Beej O.
reviews.text: Great work this young man puts in to build this company. His performance and integrity stands out profoundly.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Norfolk & surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout Hampton Roads

cta.heading: Ready for that shine?
cta.body: Free quotes, honest pricing, and work that speaks for itself. Call Anthony directly.
